summary: Target-language body composition is visually improved and close to source rhythm; remaining warnings are constrained labels/footnotes/headings that need D2 layout variants or a targeted fit repair.

dimensions.evidence: Body pages use body_flow/target_composition instead of source-line wrapping.
Page 5 text density is acceptable, but page metrics show text_area_ratio above source because English expansion is expected.
Paragraph breaks on body pages are visually coherent.
candidate_generation_evidence records target_composition_applied for body_flow regions.
Timeline/milestone page keeps event cards local and does not merge event text into body_flow.
No visible redaction color blocks after surrounding-pixel cluster fill sampling.
Table/footnote labels still have small fallback warnings; main body hierarchy is stable.
Side navigation is rendered as rotated image groups but some small labels remain fit-risk areas.
Back-rotated side navigation is readable enough for candidate review but not promoted to product pass while text_fit fails.
Tables retain structure; constrained header labels need D2 variants to remove fallback warnings.
Overall layout is close enough for candidate comparison, not enough for product acceptance because fit warnings remain.

basis: manual rendered PNG inspection in current run; no offline reference used as runtime prompt input
